topProblems: Some secondary modules still over-index first viewport on specific segments.
Fallback content labeling still inconsistent on edge cases.
findings.whyItMatters: Dashboard clarity determines daily engagement and perceived intelligence quality.
recommendedQuickWins: Enforce one primary + one supporting action across all segment variants.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Finish module slot governance and severity-based ordering engine.
trustFixes: Expose freshness/source in all hero permutations.
mobileFixes: Reduce first viewport module count on mobile homeowner segment.

topProblems: Tab semantics still differ in a few linked surfaces.
Trust summary is present but not uniformly prioritized.
findings.whyItMatters: Property hub is homeowner operational center and buyer diligence focal point.
recommendedQuickWins: Enforce stable primary action placement across all property states.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Complete tab+overflow governance for every hub sub-route.
trustFixes: Route-level trust summary should be locked in top section.
mobileFixes: Cap top-level tab count and move overflow into explicit menu.

topProblems: Segment explanation still light for first-time users.
Error/help copy consistency can be tighter across auth routes.
findings.whyItMatters: Signup quality drives activation and first trust impression.
recommendedQuickWins: Add explicit segment rationale examples.
Normalize inline validation copy tone.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Extend Auth Template to all auth routes with shared field trust hints.
trustFixes: Add data usage explanation link adjacent to submit CTA.
mobileFixes: Persist scroll-to-error for small screens.

topProblems: Some branching controls still surface early and create cognitive load.
Desktop treatment needs stronger two-pane parity in all states.
findings.whyItMatters: Guidance is trust-critical and completion-sensitive.
recommendedQuickWins: Delay alternative controls until user requests them.
Lock sticky step CTA behavior by phase.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Complete full state-map alignment to Guided Journey Template v1.
trustFixes: Keep step-level trust panel mandatory for all recommendation steps.
mobileFixes: Preserve one sticky action zone with chat-aware offset.

topProblems: Proof sequencing still inconsistent deeper in page stack.
Some legacy sections still read as feature-heavy before outcomes.
findings.whyItMatters: Top-of-funnel quality directly affects conversion and buyer diligence confidence.
recommendedQuickWins: Enforce one CTA hierarchy per section.
Add source-qualified copy to all quantified claims.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Migrate remaining legacy section blocks to marketing template primitives.
trustFixes: Standardize trust claim formatting and source notation.
mobileFixes: Cap above-the-fold content depth to headline + CTA + proof row.

topProblems: Desktop/mobile style parity still has minor drift.
Property context confidence/freshness metadata not always visible.
findings.whyItMatters: Portfolio context is entry point for downstream decision routes.
recommendedQuickWins: Add consistent property data freshness metadata row.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Converge homeowner/provider portfolio list variants on one shell.
trustFixes: Show completeness and last updated at card level.
mobileFixes: Retain single fixed bottom layer behavior globally.

topProblems: Decision mode is improving but full report mode still dominates on mobile.
Legacy dense sections still require progressive disclosure cleanup.
findings.whyItMatters: High-trust route fails if homeowners cannot act quickly.
recommendedQuickWins: Collapse non-critical sections by default.
Keep decision summary pinned near top.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Finish report dual-mode architecture across all score/report routes.
trustFixes: Retain trust depth while elevating assumptions near top action.
mobileFixes: Replace remaining wide table patterns with stacked mobile cards.

dependencies: Report section screenshot + responsive QA pass

topProblems: Filter density can still overwhelm first-time users.
Recompute semantics are not yet standardized end-to-end.
findings.whyItMatters: Status board should reduce anxiety and drive clear action ordering.
recommendedQuickWins: Pin a prioritized action strip and last-updated context.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Complete dual-mode homeowner/advanced board template.
trustFixes: Standardize recompute explainability with source/freshness deltas.
mobileFixes: Collapse secondary filters behind progressive disclosure.

topProblems: Route still reads as placeholder in parts.
Decision framing and recommendation confidence need stronger structure.
findings.whyItMatters: Weak compare experiences materially hurt value perception in diligence.
recommendedQuickWins: Add decision context and top recommendation card at top.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Complete compare template migration with normalized option cards.
trustFixes: Show source confidence and recency on each compared option.
mobileFixes: Collapse option detail by default with clear expand affordances.

topProblems: Risk rationale not always tied to one clear next step.
Desktop-heavy patterns still leak into mobile.
findings.whyItMatters: Risk route quality directly impacts trust and valuation perception.
recommendedQuickWins: Introduce priority risk/action summary block.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Migrate to decision-first detail template composition.
trustFixes: Show confidence + source + recency for every key risk callout.
mobileFixes: Replace wide matrices with stacked risk cards.

topProblems: Coverage rationale and action sequencing can be clearer.
Some compare-style content lacks outcome framing.
findings.whyItMatters: Coverage decisions are trust/financial sensitive.
recommendedQuickWins: Add one-line recommendation rationale + next action summary.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Move compare interactions to Compare Template v1 where applicable.
trustFixes: Expose assumptions and source confidence at decision point.
mobileFixes: Simplify compare details into stacked cards.

topProblems: Action path to execution still can be more explicit.
Some recommendation blocks exceed ideal density.
findings.whyItMatters: Coverage intelligence is a trust-critical decision route.
recommendedQuickWins: Add clearer one-step next action CTA near top.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Standardize compare handoff pattern into coverage options route.
trustFixes: Normalize trust strip copy for recommendation confidence context.
mobileFixes: Reduce secondary context blocks in first viewport.

topProblems: Inventory actions and data depth can feel dense.
Inconsistent state messaging on loading/error states.
findings.whyItMatters: Inventory confidence affects multiple downstream tool recommendations.
recommendedQuickWins: Prioritize top missing-data actions above table content.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Complete table-to-mobile-card transformation pattern.
trustFixes: Standardize trust strip placement for recommendation blocks.
mobileFixes: Reduce initial filter density in first viewport.

topProblems: Linked-option flow can feel complex for homeowners.
Some states still rely on dense explanatory blocks.
findings.whyItMatters: High-traffic price decision route must reduce effort, not add it.
recommendedQuickWins: Pin top recommendation and demote secondary options.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Consolidate compare interactions with unified option detail pattern.
trustFixes: Ensure confidence/source/freshness visible for each recommendation set.
mobileFixes: Default to compact cards with progressive detail reveal.

topProblems: Opportunity prioritization can be clearer.
Action links are inconsistent across opportunity cards.
findings.whyItMatters: Savings route must convert insight to action quickly.
recommendedQuickWins: Pin top savings action with expected impact and confidence.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Normalize opportunity card actions and progression state.
trustFixes: Add confidence/source labels for computed savings opportunities.
mobileFixes: Simplify opportunity card metadata stack on mobile.

dependencies: Savings confidence labels on opportunity rows

topProblems: Financial comparison framing can overload users.
Mobile financial tables still too dense.
findings.whyItMatters: Refinance outcomes are financially sensitive and must feel clear and credible.
recommendedQuickWins: Elevate one recommended option with rationale summary.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Adopt compare template with decision context slot.
trustFixes: Expose assumptions and confidence tiers for projected savings.
mobileFixes: Use mobile card summary for top 2 scenarios only.

topProblems: Legacy raw primitives remain in route implementation.
Compare narrative can be simplified for first-time users.
findings.whyItMatters: Template drift in a trust-sensitive tool drives inconsistency debt.
recommendedQuickWins: Migrate remaining raw card usage to governed templates.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Complete full compare template migration and option grouping.
trustFixes: Normalize signal strength/source disclosures by recommendation block.
mobileFixes: Reduce chip/filter density in opening viewport.

topProblems: Many room cards compete for attention.
Trust context around recommendations inconsistent by room type.
findings.whyItMatters: Rooms route drives maintenance and upgrade actions.
recommendedQuickWins: Add room-level prioritized action strip.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Unify room insight blocks under shared detail card contract.
trustFixes: Attach confidence/source consistently per room recommendation.
mobileFixes: Collapse low-priority room sections by default.

topProblems: Story mode vs list mode parity is uneven.
Actionability from timeline events can be stronger.
findings.whyItMatters: Timeline should convert history into confidence and action.
recommendedQuickWins: Add clear event-to-action CTAs for high-priority events.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Unify event card taxonomy across timeline and status routes.
trustFixes: Show source provenance for event entries.
mobileFixes: Trim timeline card metadata density on small screens.

topProblems: Legacy template drift reduced; remaining risk is final polish and state parity QA.
Trust/state pattern is implemented but needs screenshot-based regression confirmation across breakpoints.
findings.whyItMatters: Inconsistent secondary and admin/provider routes lower confidence in product maturity during diligence and day-to-day usage.
recommendedQuickWins: Complete QA screenshot baseline update for provider-family routes and validate sticky/fixed-layer behavior.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Finish Provider Shell v1 adoption on any residual provider-adjacent subroutes not yet migrated.
trustFixes: Add confidence/source/freshness framing where recommendations or derived signals are shown.
mobileFixes: Reduce first-viewport density and enforce one clear primary action path.

findings.whyItMatters: Inconsistent secondary and admin/provider routes lower confidence in product maturity during diligence and day-to-day usage.
recommendedQuickWins: Adopt route-family template wrappers and shared loading/error/empty states.
recommendedStructuralFixes: Complete route-family migration and remove legacy ad-hoc primitives from this surface.
trustFixes: Add confidence/source/freshness framing where recommendations or derived signals are shown.
mobileFixes: Reduce first-viewport density and enforce one clear primary action path.
